lines.speaker: SABLE
lines.text: S-A-B-L-E... Systems Advisor for Biome Logistics and Engineering. Rebooting.

lines.speaker: SABLE
lines.text: Critical alert: oxygen recycler offline. Atmospheric O2 at 23%. Declining.

lines.speaker: SABLE
lines.text: I've located a Python terminal in the wreckage. The recycler's control script needs a threshold variable.

lines.speaker: SABLE
lines.text: Open the terminal. Type: threshold = 18. That tells the recycler when to activate.

lines.speaker: SABLE
lines.text: Fix it, or we have approximately six hours of breathable air remaining.
